html:
Date: {{ doc.transaction_date }}

{{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "salutation") }}. {{ doc.employee_name }},
{{ doc.designation }}
{{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "branch") }}

Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "salutation") }}. {{ doc.employee_name }},

Subject: Full and Final Settlement of Dues

As per the rules of the company, the full and final settlement of your dues arising out of your resignation w.e.f. {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "resignation_letter_date"), "dd-MM-yyyy") }} has been worked out as under –


Full and Final Settlement Statement
Employee Name {{ doc.employee_name }}
Employee Code {{ doc.employee }}
Designation {{ doc.designation }}
Date of Joining {{ doc.date_of_joining }}
Date of Resignation {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "resignation_letter_date"), "dd-MM-yyyy") }}
Date of Release {{ doc.relieving_date }}
Service Period {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "custom__total_number_of_year_in_mi") }}
Notice Period (Actual) {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "notice_number_of_days") }}
Notice Period (Served) {% set res_date = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "resignation_letter_date") %} {% set rel_date = doc.relieving_date %} {{ frappe.utils.date_diff(rel_date, res_date) if res_date and rel_date else "" }}

{% set ns = namespace(total_earnings=0.0, total_deductions=0.0) %} {% for i in (doc.get("payables") or []) %} {% set amt = (i.amount or 0) | float %} {% set ns.total_earnings = ns.total_earnings + amt %} {% endfor %} {% for i in (doc.get("fnf_deductions") or []) %} {% set amt = (i.amount or 0) | float %} {% set ns.total_deductions = ns.total_deductions + amt %} {% endfor %} {% set net = ns.total_earnings - ns.total_deductions %}
Details of Earnings
{{ i.component }} {{ "%.2f"|format(amt) }}
Total Earnings {{ "%.2f"|format(ns.total_earnings) }}
{{ i.salary_component }} {{ "%.2f"|format(amt) }}
Net Payable {{ "%.2f"|format(net) }}


Please be informed that with this payment, all dues stand fully settled. No further claims shall remain.

Kindly sign and return a copy of this letter as acceptance.


With Best Wishes,

Megha Singhania
Manager - HR
name: Full and Final Statement-1
